notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 50-54 in generated discovery row order.

telekinesis::choice_or_mode.issue: Creature/object modes, same-or-new target choice, and repeated Magic action use remain prose-only beyond the basic Restrained state.
telekinesis::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telekinesis mode and target-switch fields.

telekinesis::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Runtime has the creature Strength save and Restrained state, but object modes, worn/carried object save, and automatic unattended object movement remain under-modeled.
telekinesis::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add separate creature, unattended object, and worn/carried object save branches.

telekinesis::target_filter_or_eligibilit.issue: Huge-or-smaller creature/object limits and worn/carried object branching are not represented in targeting.
telekinesis::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target size and worn/carried object eligibility fields.

telekinesis::forced_movement.issue: The 30-foot creature/object movement and pulling worn/carried objects away are not represented as movement effects.
telekinesis::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telekinetic forced movement fields for creatures and objects.

telekinesis::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible target selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

telekinesis::status_or_state_change.issue: Restrained duration is corrected, but suspended-in-air state and fall unless reapplied remain prose-only.

telekinesis::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched lifted target positioning; this is target movement/status, not an environmental change.
telekinesis::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under forced movement and status.

telekinesis::conditional_ending.issue: Switching targets ends the previous target's effect and a lifted creature falls unless reapplied; runtime lacks these ending conditions.
telekinesis::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target-switch and reapply-or-fall ending fields.

teleportation-circle::choice_or_mode.issue: The destination circle must be chosen from known same-plane sigil sequences; runtime lacks destination choice and known-sigil fields.

teleportation-circle::target_filter_or_e.issue: Arrival is within 5 feet of the destination circle or nearest unoccupied space if occupied; runtime lacks arrival-space fallback fields.
teleportation-circle::target_filter_or_e.recommendedTemplateChange: Add arrival destination and fallback occupancy fields.

teleportation-circle::terrain_or_surface.issue: The 5-foot-radius circle must be drawn on the ground and can become permanent after repeated casting; runtime lacks surface/permanence fields.
teleportation-circle::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add portal surface and permanent-circle progression fields.

teleportation-circle::travel_or_planar_m.issue: The portal travel, same-plane restriction, enter-portal trigger, and arrival placement remain prose-only.

teleportation-circle::social_or_knowledg.issue: Learning and memorizing sigil sequences, including two starting Material Plane destinations and studying for 1 minute, remain prose-only.

teleportation-circle::status_or_state_ch.issue: Committing a new sigil sequence to memory after study is a knowledge-state change not represented in runtime.

transmute-rock::choice_or_mode.issue: The spell has rock-to-mud and mud-to-rock modes with different saves, terrain, damage, restraint, and object stats; runtime only has one damage effect.

transmute-rock::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Strength saves for mud restraint, Dexterity saves for falling mud damage, and Dexterity saves for mud-to-rock shunting/restraint are not all represented.

transmute-rock::target_filter_or_eligibi.issue: Safe shunting to an unoccupied surface space is not represented.

transmute-rock::forced_movement.issue: Sinking into mud and shunting to the surface are not represented as movement/position outcomes.
transmute-rock::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sink and shunt movement fields.

transmute-rock::terrain_or_surface.issue: Mud difficult movement cost, rock/mud surface transformation, ceiling mud fall, and mud depth limits are prose-only.

transmute-rock::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible area selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

transmute-rock::resource_or_consumption.issue: Movement cost through mud is terrain movement cost, not resource consumption.

transmute-rock::object_stats_or_damageab.issue: The restraining rock's AC 15, 25 HP, and poison/psychic immunity are not represented.

transmute-rock::status_or_state_change.issue: Restrained by mud/rock, action escape, DC 20 Strength check, and damage-to-break options are not fully represented.

transmute-rock::environmental_change.issue: The area changes between rock and mud and can create falling mud; runtime lacks environment transformation data.

tree-stride::choice_or_mode.issue: Runtime now has a teleport surface, but destination spot choice within 5 feet and no-movement fallback remain prose-only.

tree-stride::repeat_save_or_recurring_ch.closedReason: Tree Stride now records the end-turn outside-tree restriction as structured Recurring Mechanics and runtime recurringMechanics data.
tree-stride::repeat_save_or_recurring_ch.issue: The caster must end each turn outside a tree; runtime lacks this per-turn restriction.

tree-stride::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The once-per-turn transportation ability is now represented as a per-turn MOVEMENT effect.
tree-stride::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: No new sustain-action field required for this pass.
tree-stride::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT teleport with per-turn consumption.

tree-stride::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The tree-to-tree transportation is now represented as a MOVEMENT teleport effect.

tree-stride::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: The caster instantly knows the location of all same-kind trees within 500 feet; runtime lacks typed local knowledge/sensor fields.
tree-stride::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add same-kind tree location knowledge fields.

wall-of-force::choice_or_mode.issue: The wall's main spatial forms and panel choices are already represented in spatialDetails; push side choice remains tracked under forced_movement.
wall-of-force::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No new form-choice field required for this pass.

wall-of-force::forced_movement.issue: If the wall cuts through a creature's space, the creature is pushed to a chosen side; runtime lacks this push effect.

wall-of-force::terrain_or_surface.issue: Orientation, free-floating/resting placement, dome/globe/flat panel forms, dimensions, and thickness are represented in structured/runtime spatial fields.
wall-of-force::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No new terrain/surface field required for this pass.

wall-of-force::vision_light_sound.issue: The wall is Invisible, but runtime only records it in prose.

wall-of-force::created_object_or_structu.issue: Runtime now marks the utility as creation and captures geometry, but physical pass-through blocking, damage immunity, Dispel Magic immunity, and Disintegrate destruction remain prose-only.
wall-of-force::created_object_or_structu.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall barrier/material immunity and spell-destruction fields.

wall-of-force::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The wall extends into the Ethereal Plane and blocks ethereal travel, but this planar blocking is not typed.

wall-of-force::status_or_state_change.issue: The wall's Invisible state is prose-only.
